editmassmessagelist: Wax ka beddel liiska gudbinta fariimaha guud
massmessage-desc: Waxay u oggolaanaysaa isticmaalayaasha inay si fudud farriin ugu diraan liiska isticmaalayaasha
massmessage-form-spamlist: Bog ama qayb ka kooban liiska bogaga lagu reebayo farriin:
massmessage-form-subject: Mawduuca farriinta (sidoo kale waxaa loo isticmaalaa sida qoraalka kooban ee wax ka beddelka):
massmessage-form-subject-help: Tan waa la iska indhatiraa haddii qayb ka mid ah bogga loo doorto in loo diro sidii mawduuc
massmessage-form-page-help: Qoraalka fariinta, haddii la bixiyo, waxaa lagu dari doonaa dhammaadka nuxurka bogga la doortay.
massmessage-form-page-message-section: Qaybta bogga ee loo dirayo fariin ahaan:
massmessage-form-page-message-section-he: Dooro bog oo hor-u-eeg foomka si aad u aragto liiska qaybaha la heli karo. Haddii qayb la doorto, kaliya taas ayaa loo diri doonaa fariin ahaan.
massmessage-form-page-subject-section: Qaybta bogga ee loo dirayo mawduuc ahaan:
massmessage-form-page-subject-section-he: Dooro bog oo hor-u-eeg foomka si aad u aragto liiska qaybaha la heli karo. Haddii qayb la doorto, kaliya taas ayaa loo diri doonaa mawduuc ahaan. Khadadka cusub iyo calaamadaha waa la tirtiraa.
massmessage-preview-count: Fariintaada waxaa loo diri doonaa {{PLURAL:$1|$1 bog|$1 bogag}}.
massmessage-translate-page-info: Waxaad dooratay bog la tarjumi karo oo loo diri doono fariin ahaan. Dadka isdiiwaangeliyay waxay heli doonaan nuxurka bogga luqaddooda ay doorbideen, ama luqad kale oo kayd ah haddii tarjumaad la heli waayo.
massmessage-submitted: Fariintaada loo dirayo {{PLURAL:$1|$1 bog|$1 bogag}} ayaa safka la geliyay.
massmessage-just-preview: Kani waa kaliya hor-u-eegis. Riix "{{int:massmessage-form-submit}}" si aad u dirto fariinta.
massmessage-spamlist-doesnotexist: Bogga liiska gudbinta ama qaybta la cayimay ma jiro.
massmessage-spamlist-invalid: Bogga la cayimay kuma jiro liis gudbin sax ah.
massmessage-empty-message: Qoraalka fariinta waa madhan. Bixi qoraalka fariinta, ama dooro bog loo diri doono fariin ahaan.
massmessage-page-message-invalid: Bogga "$1", ee loo doortay in loo diro fariin ahaan, ma aha mid sax ah.
massmessage-page-message-not-found: Bogga "$1" ee loo doortay in loo diro fariin ahaan lama helin.
massmessage-page-message-no-revision: Bogga "$1" ee loo doortay in loo diro fariin ahaan ma laha nooc dib u eegis ah oo la adeegsan karo.
massmessage-page-message-no-revision-con: Bogga "$1" ee loo doortay in loo diro fariin ahaan ma laha wax nuxur ah oo dib u eegis ah. Aqoonsiga dib u eegista: "$2"
massmessage-page-message-wiki-not-found: Lama helin wiki-ga "$1" si loo soo qaato bogga "$2" ee loo doortay in loo diro fariin ahaan.
massmessage-page-message-fetch-error-in-: Waxaa dhacay khalad markii la soo qaadayay bogga "$2" ee loo doortay in loo diro fariin ahaan, kana yimid wiki-ga "$1". Khalad: $3
massmessage-page-message-parsing-error-i: Khalad ayaa dhacay intii la turjumayay jawaabta JSON ee wiki-ga: "$1", marka la soo qaadayay bogga: "$2" ee loo doortay in loo diro fariin ahaan. Khalad: $3
massmessage-page-message-not-found-in-wi: Bogga "$2" ee wiki-ga "$1", ee loo doortay in loo diro fariin ahaan, lama helin.
massmessage-page-message-parse-invalid-i: Jawaab aan sax ahayn ayaa la diray markii la soo qaadayay bogga "$2", ee loo doortay in loo diro fariin ahaan, kana yimid wiki-ga "$1". Jawaab: $3
massmessage-page-message-empty: Bogga "$1" ee loo doortay in loo diro fariin ahaan ma laha wax nuxur ah.
massmessage-page-subject-empty: Qaybta "$1" ee lagu doortay bogga "$2" si loogu diro mawduuc ahaan ma laha wax nuxur ah.
massmessage-unescaped-langlinks: Digniin: Waxaa jira xiriirro luqadeed oo aan la kaahin farriintaada.
massmessage-no-timestamp: Digniin: Fariintaada kuma jiro waqti ama saxiix.
massmessage-form-header: Isticmaal foomka hoose si aad fariimo ugu dirto liis cayiman. Dhammaan meelaha waa khasab in la buuxiyo ([https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Extension:MassMessage macluumaad dheeraad ah]).
massmessage-redirect-notice: (Fariintan waxaa loo diray [[:$1]] waxaana halkan lagu soo dhejiyay sababo la xiriira sii toosin.)
massmessage-hidden-comment: <!-- Fariintan waxaa diray User:$1@$2 iyadoo la adeegsanayo liiska ku yaal $3 -->
massmessage-badhtml: Fariintaada waxaa laga yaabaa inay leedahay {{PLURAL:$2|calaamada HTML oo aan la xirin|calaamadaha HTML oo aan la xirin}}: $1.
massmessage-parse-badpage: "$1" ma aha cinwaan bog sax ah.
massmessage-parse-badspamlist: "$1" ma aha liis bogag sax ah.
massmessage-parse-badexternal: "$1" ma aha cinwaan bog sax ah. Bartilmaameedyada interwiki waa in lagu qeexaa iyadoo la adeegsanayo xuduudaha site (<kbd>|site=www.example.org</kbd>).
massmessage-global-disallowed: Farriimaha waxaa kaliya loo diri karaa bogagga maxalliga ah.
right-massmessage: U dir farriin dhowr isticmaale hal mar
action-massmessage: U dir farriin dhowr isticmaale hal mar
log-description-massmessage: Dhacdooyinkan waxay la socdaan isticmaalayaasha diraya farriimaha.
logentry-massmessage-failure: Gudbinta "$4" ee $3 way fashilantay iyadoo leh koodh khalad $5
logentry-massmessage-failure-section: Gudbinta "$4" ee $3 way fashilantay sababtoo ah mawduuca shaqeynaya waa madhan. Sababta ugu badan: qaybta $5 ee bogga [[$6]] waa khalad. Hubi calaamadaha "<" ee aan sax ahayn.
logentry-massmessage-skipbadns: Gudbinta "$4" ee $3 waa la dhaafay sababtoo ah bartilmaameedku wuxuu ku jiraa meel magac aan lagu diri karin farriin
logentry-massmessage-skipoptout: Gudbinta "$4" ee $3 waa la dhaafay sababtoo ah bartilmaameedku wuu diiday helista farriimaha
logentry-massmessage-skipnouser: Gudbinta "$4" ee $3 waa la dhaafay sababtoo ah koontada isticmaale ma jirto
massmessage-content-removeerror: Ka saarista bogga way fashilantay iyadoo leh koodh khalad $1.
massmessage-content-empty: Liiskan wax bogag ah kuma jiraan.
massmessage-content-invalidtargets: Liiskan waxaa ku jira bartilmaameedyo aan sax ahayn.
massmessage-content-alreadyinlist: Boggan hore ayuu ugu jiraa liiska.
massmessage-ch-tojsonerror: Liiska lama kaydin karin si sax ah.
massmessage-create-new: Samee liis cusub oo gudbin ah
massmessage-create-import: Ka soo dejiso bogag liis ama qayb jira
massmessage-create-editsummary-import: Samee liis gudbinta farriin guud oo leh bartilmaameedyo ka yimid [[Special:Permalink/$2|$1]]
massmessage-create-editsummary-catimport: Samee liis gudbinta farriin guud oo leh bartilmaameedyo ka yimid [[$1]]
massmessage-create-exists: Bog hore ayuu u jiraa cinwaankan la cayimay.
massmessage-create-nopermission: Ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku abuuri karto liis cinwaankan leh.
massmessage-create-invalidsource: Ilaha la cayimay ma aha liis gudbin sax ah ama qayb leh ugu yaraan hal bog.
editmassmessagelist-legend: Wax ka beddel liiska gudbinta farriimaha guud
massmessage-edit-header: Isticmaal foomka hoose si aad u beddesho sharaxaadda liiska ama aad wax uga beddesho liiska bogagga bartilmaameedka ah. Bogagga bartilmaameedka ah, ku qor hal cinwaan khad kasta.
massmessage-edit-headermulti: Isticmaal foomka hoose si aad u beddesho sharaxaadda liiska ama aad wax uga beddesho liiska bogagga bartilmaameedka ah. Bogagga bartilmaameedka ah, hal cinwaan ku qor khad kasta, oo isticmaal title@domain (tusaale User_talk:Example@en.wikipedia.org) si aad u qeexdo bog ku yaal wiki kale.
massmessage-edit-invalidtitle: Ma jiro liis gudbinta fariimaha guud oo sax ah oo leh cinwaankan.
massmessage-edit-invalidtargets:
{{PLURAL:$1|Bogga soo socda waa|Bogagga soo socda waa}} aan sax ahayn:
$2
massmessage-edit-missingsummary: Ma aadan bixin soo koobid wax ka beddel. Haddii aad mar kale riixdo "{{int:htmlform-submit}}", wax ka beddelkaaga waxaa la keydin doonaa adigoon soo koobid lahayn.
massmessage-edit-nopermission: Ma haysatid oggolaansho aad wax kaga beddesho liiska.
massmessage-summary-addremove: $1 {{PLURAL:$1|bog ayaa|bogag ayaa}} lagu daray, $2 {{PLURAL:$2|bog ayaa|bogag ayaa}}na waa laga saaray
massmessage-summary-addremovechange: Waxaa lagu daray $1 {{PLURAL:$1|bog|bogag}}, laga saaray $2 {{PLURAL:$2|bog|bogag}}, lana beddelay sharraxaadda
massmessage-summary-addchange: Waxaa lagu daray [[:$1]] lana beddelay sharraxaadda
massmessage-summary-addonsitechange: Waxaa lagu daray $1 maalinta $2 lana beddelay sharraxaadda
massmessage-summary-addmultichange: Waxaa lagu daray $1 {{PLURAL:$1|bog|bogag}} lana beddelay sharraxaadda
massmessage-summary-removechange: Waxaa laga saaray [[:$1]] lana beddelay sharraxaadda
massmessage-summary-removeonsitechange: Waxaa laga saaray $1 maalinta $2 lana beddelay sharraxaadda
massmessage-summary-removemultichange: Waxaa laga saaray $1 {{PLURAL:$1|bog|bogag}} lana beddelay sharraxaadda
massmessage-list-category-desc: Boggan waa liis gudbin loogu talagalay kordhinta [[Special:MassMessage|MassMessage]].
log-action-filter-massmessage-skipoptout: Bartilmaameedka waa laga booday sababtoo ah wuu ka baxay
log-action-filter-massmessage-skipnouser: Bartilmaameedka waa laga booday sababtoo ah isticmaale aan jirin
log-action-filter-massmessage-skipbadns: Bartilmaameedka waa laga booday sababtoo ah magac-meel waa la mamnuucay
